I have everything I need for a complete picture. Here is the synthesis:

---

## Environment-Wide Sweep — Last Hour Summary

### What was observed

**Overall: No acute incident in the last 1 hour.** All 1,204 patterns cleared the week-over-week delta threshold (cost_drivers returned a clean negative). No forwarder dark zones — all services with 24h history are still emitting within the last 15 min
